(403/CWW) PET IN PRO PER; RONALD ST. CLAIR WITH RESP WHO APPEARED BY PHONE FROM CHICAGO. AFTER A CHAMBERS CONFERENCE THAT WAS NOT REPORTED, THE MATTER WENT ON THE RECO
RD. AFTER ARGUMENT AND SUBMISSION, THE COURT MADE THE FOLLOWING ORDERS. JURISDICTION IS APPROPRIATE IN AND EXCLUSIVE TO S.F. THE PARTIES AGREE TO
LIDAY VACATION DECEMBER 16-28, 2000 IN CHICAGO. PET SHALL ACCOMPANY MINOR TO AND FROM CHICAGO AND ALSO PAY TRANSPORTATION COSTS FOR BOTH MINOR AND
F $1,500 DIRECTLY TO RESP'S COUNSEL SINCE HE HAS GREATLY ABILITY TO PAY, $150/MO. BEGINNING 11/1/00 ON THE FIRST OF EACH MONTH. REPORT OF RHONDA
ORDER SINCE MINOR IS CURRENTLY LIVING WITH PET. FULL, , PRIVATE PHONE CONTACT BETWEEN MINOR AND RESP SHALL CONTINUE; PARTIES TO WORK ON AN
RE CC/CV. EVEN IF COURT DETERMINES MINOR SHOULD MOVE TO CHICAGO, IT IS UNLIKELY THAT MINOR'S SCHOOL YEAR WILL BE INTERRUPTED; SHE SHOULD FINISH
SCHOOL YEAR IN S.F. RESP TO PREPARE THE ORDER. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797. YEAR WILL BE INTERRUPTED; SHE SHOULD FINISH
